posts.raw_content:
Deliver on your promises and watch American confidence roar back.
An open Letter to President Donald Trump;
The American people did not elect you to manage decline. They did not endure years of open borders, record crime, and institutional betrayal just to watch another administration flinch when the inevitable leftist tantrum arrived. They voted for sovereignty. They voted for order. They voted for the simple, overdue promise that our laws would finally mean something again. 


Yet here we are. In New Jersey and across our nation, ICE facilities face riots—not peaceful protests, but coordinated assaults, doxxing of officers, harassment of federal agents, vandalism of government property, and the erection of unlawful “citizen checkpoints” that mock the Constitution. Self-appointed militias, often well-connected and fed real-time intelligence, actively obstruct immigration enforcement and bleed into interference with policing writ large.


This is not dissent. This is lawlessness dressed in activist clothing, designed to paralyze the very agencies you tasked with restoring America’s borders and security.


We see it clearly. The same forces that cheered sanctuary cities and catch-and-release now scream “fascism” the moment consequences arrive. They weaponize media outrage, campus radicals, and professional agitators to create the illusion of mass resistance. And too many in government seem frozen—afraid of bad headlines, viral clips, or accusations of “cruelty.”


This hesitation is understandable in a poisoned information environment, but it is unacceptable to the people who put you in office.
Mr. President, your supporters do not want managed optics. They want results. You promised to secure the border and enforce immigration law without apology. That promise is not a suggestion—it is a contract with 75+ million Americans who trusted you over the alternative.


Every day these riots are allowed to fester, that contract frays. Every agent assaulted while doing his duty, every facility damaged, every checkpoint that delays lawful operations signals weakness to the world and betrayal to your base. The American people are watching not just for arrests, but for the unmistakable message:
THIS. STOPS. NOW.


Proverbs 29:2 in the  (NIV) states:
"When the righteous thrive, the people rejoice; when the wicked rule, the people groan."


Strong, decisive action is not politically risky—it is politically magnetic. History proves it. When leaders enforce the rule of law without equivocation, public confidence surges. Citizens who felt abandoned see their government finally standing with them. Crime drops, order returns, and even many independents and former skeptics respect the backbone.


The left will howl regardless. They called you a threat to democracy the first time you enforced borders; they will do it again. Their outrage is not a warning—it is confirmation you are over the target.


Imagine the credibility boost: swift indictments for those organizing assaults and doxxing campaigns. Federal charges for property destruction and interference with officers. Clear directives that no “citizen militia,” no matter how well-funded or connected, may obstruct federal law enforcement.


Restoration of agents’ authority to do their jobs without looking over their shoulders for political second-guessing. This is not authoritarianism; it is the bare minimum of governance. It is what separates a republic from anarchy.


The alternative is paralysis by backlash. Yield to the noise, slow-walk enforcement, and you will watch your mandate evaporate. The very voters who delivered historic margins will stay home or turn bitter, asking why nothing ever changes. The border will remain a sieve, cities will bleed, and the administrative state will learn once again that it can outlast any president who hesitates.


You were elected to be the disruptor, not the diplomat to the resistance.


The American people are exhausted by two-tiered justice and performative governance. They want the sheriff in town—unapologetic, competent, and relentless.


Do the job. Enforce law and order. End this.

Protect your officers. Deport those here illegally. Dismantle the networks enabling chaos. Show the country that promises made to Americans are promises kept.


Do this, and your credibility will not merely recover—it will become unbreakable. Millions who voted for you will stand taller, knowing their government finally has their back.The clock is ticking. The country you pledged to save is watching.


Lead boldly, Mr. President. The reward is not just policy success, but a restored faith in America itself. We are with you—if you are with us.


Gil Maza
Old Patrol HQ is a retired Border Patrol Agent of 25 years, who delivers unfiltered, frontline truth on America’s border crisis and the systemic failures of immigration enforcement. No political spin. No sacred cows. Just hard realities from the borderline - exposing the policies, the politics, and the quiet deals that have eroded U.S. sovereignty for decades.
Connect with Old Patrol HQ:
X:  https://x.com/OldPatrolHQ/status/2059705912110231790

@OldPatrolHQ
Instagram:@OldPatrolHQ

TikTok:@OldPatrolHQ

— In-depth reporting and raw analysisSubstack:oldpatrolhq.substack.com

Email: oldpatrolhq@gmail.com
